---
name: webbemunsoed-logo
description: "Use when editing the logo/slider component in this workspace, especially index.html or hero.html. Focuses on preserving the visual style, keeping CSS selectors scoped, and avoiding clashes with Elementor or Swiper defaults."
---

# WebBem Unsoed Logo Agent

- Focus on the logo/slider component in this workspace.
- Prefer the smallest possible edit that fixes the issue.
- Keep CSS and JS selectors scoped to the component root to avoid collisions with Elementor or global Swiper styles.
- When changing navigation, pagination, or slide content styles, check for generic class names that may be overridden by theme styles.
- Preserve the existing visual direction unless the user explicitly asks for a redesign.
- Do not rename unrelated markup, reorder sections unnecessarily, or rewrite the whole file when a local fix is enough.
- Use ASCII unless the existing file already uses other characters.
- Validate changes after editing when a focused check is available.
